contradiction_text: Gemini CLI had the largest stated context window and later completed the backend refactor on the first try after loading broad codebase context, yet it performed worst in the blank-repo app-generation task.
related_claim_texts: Gemini CLI’s very large context window did not translate into top performance in the blank-repo task, even though it later completed the backend refactor on the first try after loading broad codebase context.
disclosure: Large context capacity may help repository-oriented work, but this material does not support treating context-window size as a general predictor of coding-agent performance across task types.

contradiction_text: The benchmark presents precise final cross-tool averages even though the production-code comparison used different tasks for different tools and was scored mainly by overall impression rather than identical execution.
related_claim_texts: The benchmark’s final cross-tool rankings should be treated cautiously because the production-code comparison used different tasks for different tools and was scored mainly by overall impression rather than identical execution.
disclosure: The final score table can support directional judgment, but the appearance of exact ranking overstates what this method can cleanly establish.
